articles.title: Masataka Yoshida hits a home run in Japan’s win vs. Korea, with Drake Maye in attendance
articles.description:
Yoshida went 2-for-4 with three RBIs in Japan's win over Korea on Saturday.

The post Masataka Yoshida hits a home run in Japan’s win vs. Korea, with Drake Maye in attendance appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Masataka Yoshida hit a home run in Japan's 7-1 victory over Korea on March 7.
Yoshida recorded two hits and three RBIs, showcasing his talent for Boston Red Sox fans.
Drake Maye's attendance highlights Boston's growing interest in international baseball events.

articles.title: This Roslindale native is running her first Boston Marathon for Mass. Eye and Ear
articles.description:
Makayla Aboujaoude-Quirk is running the 2026 Boston Marathon.

The post This Roslindale native is running her first Boston Marathon for Mass. Eye and Ear appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Makayla Aboujaoude-Quirk will run her first Boston Marathon in 2026.
She is raising funds for Mass. Eye and Ear, a local healthcare institution.
Her participation highlights community support for Boston's health initiatives.

articles.title: It was overdue, but Tim Legler was promoted to ESPN/ABC’s top NBA broadcast team this season, and he’s thriving
articles.description:
Legler is ESPN/ABC’s longest-tenured NBA analyst and perhaps its most widely respected, having joined the network in 2000.

The post It was overdue, but Tim Legler was promoted to ESPN/ABC’s top NBA broadcast team this season, and he’s thriving appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tim Legler was promoted to ESPN/ABC’s top NBA broadcast team for the 2023 season.
Legler has been with ESPN since 2000, making him the longest-tenured NBA analyst.
Boston residents can expect enhanced NBA coverage with Legler's expertise during Celtics games.

articles.title: Cooper Flagg was the Maine story in Jayson Tatum’s return
articles.description:
Flagg had 16 points, 8 rebounds, and 6 assists in his second appearance since returning from a foot injury that cost him eight games.

The post Cooper Flagg was the Maine story in Jayson Tatum’s return appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cooper Flagg scored 16 points in his second game back from injury.
Flagg also recorded 8 rebounds and 6 assists against the Mavericks.
Jayson Tatum's return boosts Celtics' morale as playoffs approach.
